payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Frontal view of a dark brown wooden cabinet door with a raised rectangular center panel, matte finish and subtle surface wear; the top rail and a narrow gap are visible and the right edge appears slightly cropped — estimated distance from camera ~0.8 m.
